title: Worktree Setup Configuration
description: Configuration for git worktree initialization per repository

repositories.description: Map of repository identifiers to their setup configuration. Key should be the repo host/owner/name (e.g., 'github.com/owner/repo')

init.description: Command to run after creating the worktree (e.g., 'pnpm i', 'npm install', 'yarn')

envFiles.description: List of environment files to copy from main repo to worktree (relative paths)
